# Official Plugin Package Policy Instructions

This file is a GitHub Copilot routing shim.

Canonical source:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/plugins.md`

For related work, also read:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/configuration.md` when plugin configuration shape, path resolution, or precedence is affected
- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/schema.md` when plugin extension fields or output serialization are affected
- `packages/gitlode/docs/usage.md` when user-facing plugin setup or examples are affected

Do not treat this file as an independent source of truth.
